policy.floor_protection: Cards carrying any currently missing core role are blocked from cut suggestions.
policy.land_gap_rule: Land additions must cut nonland spell slots to actually repair land quantity.
policy.promotion_block: No deck change is promoted without candidate copy, structure/legal recheck, strategy matrix, battle gate, and replay trace.
policy.review_only: Cut candidates and add/cut pairs are hypotheses only.
